Background

About the project

Open repository, package, and project-context links for the maintained fork.

What changed

Documentation refresh status

The site is now built around a local JekyllNet template and a chapter-based manual with a generated appendix.

Reference manual

The main entry point for setup, package selection, UI, deployment, and supporting appendix material.

Guides

Operational articles preserved and normalized for Docker, branding, webhooks, probes, discovery, and the operator.

About the project

Repository links, package registry links, and a concise summary of what the site contains.

Documentation, reference material, and changelog for the actively maintained DotNetDiag HealthChecks fork.
